node.name: Eastern Boreal Ruderal Wetland Forests
description: Vegetation dominated by ruderal vegetation (nonnative invasive or weedy native vegetation that invades natural stands or vegetation that dominates on formerly cleared and/or planted sites but which has been allowed to succeed more-or-less spontaneously). Tree composition dominated by ruderal native or exotic species (>= 80% RIV) (see Appendix B – needs to be refined for this Division).
